_request_preview: [turn-1] What extra costs apply if I see an out-of-network provider?
content: Using an out-of-network (Tier 2) provider means you pay the difference between the provider's billed charge and HealthGuard's allowed amount, on top of standard out-of-network cost-sharing. Those costs do not count toward your in-network out-of-pocket maximum — a separate out-of-network OOP maximum of 2x your in-network amount applies instead (Administration — Network Tiers).
